Variables.Name: BoxExtents
Variables.Description: Extents of the box to use for simulation

Variables.Name: LocalJointOffset
Variables.Description: Vector relative to the body being simulated to attach the constraint to

Variables.Name: ConstraintSetup
Variables.Description: Data describing the constraints we will apply to the body

Variables.Name: SphereCollisionRadius
Variables.Description: Radius to use if CollisionType is set to CustomSphere
